declarations.name: LionButton
declarations.description: A button component from ING Bank's Lion library, with deep accessibility support.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Disables the button, preventing user interaction.

members.name: type
members.description: The button type, maps to the native button type attribute.

attributes.name: aria-disabled
attributes.description: Reflects the disabled state for assistive technologies.

attributes.name: aria-pressed
attributes.description: Indicates whether the button is in a pressed state.

declarations.name: LionInput
declarations.description: An accessible input field component from Lion, supporting validation, labels, and feedback.

members.name: label
members.description: The label text displayed above the input.

members.name: value
members.description: The current value of the input field.

members.name: placeholder
members.description: Placeholder text shown when the input is empty.

members.name: name
members.description: The name attribute for form submission.

members.name: modelValue
members.description: The model value used internally by Lion's form system.

members.name: errorMessage
members.description: Error message displayed when validation fails.

members.name: showsFeedbackFor
members.description: Controls which feedback conditions (error, warning, info, success) are shown.

slots.name: help-text
slots.description: Help text displayed below the label.

cssProperties.name: --lion-input-border-color
cssProperties.description: Border color of the input field.

cssProperties.name: --lion-input-focus-border-color
cssProperties.description: Border color of the input when focused.

declarations.name: LionDialog
declarations.description: An accessible dialog/modal component from Lion, managing focus trapping and ARIA attributes.

members.name: isOpened
members.description: Whether the dialog is currently open.

members.name: hasBackdrop
members.description: When true, renders a backdrop behind the dialog.

members.name: preventsScroll
members.description: When true, prevents document scrolling while the dialog is open.

events.name: before-opened
events.description: Fired before the dialog opens. Cancelable.

events.name: opened
events.description: Fired after the dialog has fully opened.

events.name: before-closed
events.description: Fired before the dialog closes. Cancelable.

events.name: closed
events.description: Fired after the dialog has fully closed.

slots.description: Default slot for dialog trigger content.

slots.name: invoker
slots.description: The element that triggers the dialog (e.g. a button).

slots.name: content
slots.description: The main content of the dialog.

declarations.name: LionSelectRich
declarations.description: An accessible rich select component from Lion, providing a custom dropdown with full keyboard and ARIA support.

members.name: label
members.description: The label text for the select.

members.name: modelValue
members.description: The currently selected value in Lion's model system.

members.name: multiple
members.description: Allows multiple items to be selected.

members.name: showAllOnEmpty
members.description: When true, shows all options when no value is selected.

events.name: model-value-changed
events.description: Fired when the selected model value changes.

events.name: user-input-changed
events.description: Fired when the user directly changes the input value.

slots.name: help-text
slots.description: Help text displayed below the select.
